data.title: Cosmos Health Receives New Contract Manufacturing Orders Totaling 253,657 Units Across a Range of Medicines
data.description: Cosmos Health has recently secured a series of new contract manufacturing orders, which collectively amount to an impressive total of 253,657 units. These orders span a diverse array of medicines, showcasing the company's versatility and commitment to producing a wide range of pharmaceutical products. This significant development highlights Cosmos Health's growing presence in the healthcare sector and solidifies its position as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. informs about Interim report on the transactions conducted under the Share Buy- Back Programme
data.description: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has released an interim report regarding the transactions carried out within their Share Buy-Back Programme. The report outlines the details of the acquisitions made by the bank. This initiative reflects the bank's strategy to repurchase its own shares from the market. The report provides information on the number of shares bought back, the average purchase price, and the total value of the transactions. This transparency allows stakeholders to track the bank's efforts in managing its share capital.

data.title: LINK price may test $7.50 before potential $8.12 recovery. Currently trading at $7.80 after 25% drop. Support crucial at $7.50 to avoid further decline.
data.description: Chainlink is currently priced at $7.80 following a 25% drop from its moving averages, and its Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates approaching oversold conditions. In order to avoid a further decline to $7.03, the critical support level at $7.50 must be maintained.

data.title: AVAX at $6.35 support, eyes $7.00 recovery in 72 hours. RSI 24 and Bollinger Bands suggest bounce or drop below $6.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AVAX is currently experiencing an oversold condition with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 24 and is trading close to the lower Bollinger Band. The next 72 hours will be crucial in determining its price movement. If the support at $6.35 holds, there is a potential for a bounce back to $7.00. However, if the support level does not hold, there may be a drop to below $6.00.

data.title: Polkadot's RSI at 29.63 in oversold zone, 69% long positions. Predicted $1.10 recovery in 30 days amid bearish trend.
data.description: RSI has dropped significantly to an oversold level of 29.63 while institutional investors are heavily invested with 69% in long positions. Despite the prevailing bearish trend, there is a strong likelihood of a notable rebound for DOT towards the $1.10 resistance level.

data.title: F&M Bank Launches 2nd Annual “Great Briefcase Hunt” with $10,000 Prize
data.description: Starting on June 15, F&M will be reintroducing The Great Briefcase Hunt, a highly anticipated summer community event.

data.title: Mooney Farms' Bella Sun Luci Salad Vinaigrette Line Named 2026 "Salad Dressing Product of the Year" By The Mindful Awards
data.description: The 2026 Mindful Awards Program in Los Angeles celebrated top companies, services, and products in the packaged goods industry. This annual awards program recognizes entities that prioritize mindfulness and conscious practices. The awards highlight leading companies and products that embody mindfulness. The event took place on June 12, 2026, attracting a diverse range of participants from the industry. The program serves as an independent platform honoring businesses that demonstrate a commitment to mindfulness in their operations.

data.title: Study finds AI agents vulnerable to prompt injection attacks as companies expand tech use, raising concern among researchers.
data.description: A recent comprehensive study discovered that artificial intelligence (AI) agents are still at risk of prompt injection attacks, despite the growing trend of companies introducing this technology to the public. This highlights an ongoing vulnerability in AI systems that organizations need to address. The study emphasized the importance of robust security measures as the use of AI continues to rise. The findings underscore the need for vigilance, with the data showing that a significant percentage of AI agents are susceptible to prompt injection attacks. This serves as a caution for companies and developers working on AI technologies to bolster their defenses and implement stricter security protocols to safeguard against potential threats. The study's results underscore the urgency for enhancing security in AI systems, especially with the increasing integration of these technologies in various sectors. It is crucial for businesses to prioritize cybersecurity measures to mitigate risks and protect sensitive information from exploitation.

data.title: FallTech® Launches CTR™ Class 1 SRL Series: "This is Class 1 Done Right"
data.description: A recently released Class 1 self-retracting lifeline by FallTech offers a blend of lightweight design, durable construction, and optimized performance for overhead tie-off tasks. Unveiled in Los Angeles on June 12, 2026, the CTR™ Class 1 SRL Series ensures natural walking-speed operation. This innovative lifeline enhances mobility while maintaining compactness, catering to safety during overhead applications.

data.title: NexusTek Announces Construction Industry Solutions to Address Growing IT and Cybersecurity Challenges
data.description: The Denver-based company, NexusTek, revealed on June 12, 2026, a new lineup of construction industry solutions to aid businesses in managing increasing IT complexity, cybersecurity risks, and operational needs. NexusTek, renowned for its AI, infrastructure, and security services, introduced this specialized set of solutions to tackle these challenges for firms operating in the construction sector. This move aims to address the heightened needs of construction companies grappling with digital transformation and security concerns.

data.title: Kootenay Reports Incident at Columba Silver Project
data.description: Vancouver-based Kootenay Silver Inc. (TSXV: KTN) (OTCQX: KOOYF) announced that a contract miner at their Columba project was tragically in an accident in the F Vein shaft on June 11, 2026. The incident occurred on Thursday, and the company expressed regret over the situation. This news comes as a saddening update regarding the safety within their operations.

data.title: Make Music Ventura: A FREE day of live music, community celebration, and hands-on fun for all ages
data.description: Ventura Music Festival (VMF) and Downtown Ventura Partners are hosting Make Music Ventura in Downtown Ventura on June 12, 2026. The event features live music on several stages, a Family Fun Zone, drum circles, and a live mural. This free community music celebration promises a day filled with entertainment for all attendees. Bring your family and friends to enjoy the festivities across Downtown Ventura.

data.title: McGraw Hill Tops Q4 Estimates But Soft Guidance, Choppy K-12 Market Weigh
data.description: McGraw Hill Inc (NYSE: MH) saw a decline in shares on Friday despite positive fiscal fourth-quarter results. Analysts shared their insights with BTIG analyst Marvin Fong maintaining a Buy rating but lowering the price target from $22 to $19. Needham analyst Ryan MacDonald also reiterated a Buy rating with a $19 price target. According to Fong, McGraw Hill surpassed revenue expectations by $24 million, driven by Higher Education revenues exceeding Street expectations by $20 million. The company's guidance indicates challenges in K-12 dynamics in California and Texas, but Higher Education remains a strong area. For more analyst ratings, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.
Iran’s Foreign Minister Araghchi: The nuclear issue and lifting of Iran sanctions have been postponed to the second stage, and 60 days of negotiation time is predicted for these topics.
